result.stdout:
Description:
  Convert appsettings.json into environment variables

Usage:
  Emm.AppSettingsToEnv [options]

Options:
  --json <json>    appsettings.json
  --level <level>  [user or machine] [default: user]
  --version        Show version information
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information
